extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked with 2.5km remaining on La Loge de Gardes, bridged to GAUDU's earlier move, and dropped him in the final kilometer for stage win and yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD attacked first with 4km remaining but POGAČAR marked, neutralizing the Tour champion's acceleration without excessive effort.
GAUDU launched 3.5km out requiring team support signals at Tour, forcing UAE to chase rather than control passively.
GROßSCHARTNER paced yellow jersey CORT into climb base, revealing UAE willing to burn Austrian champion early for positioning.
MATTHEWS sprinted intermediate with 20km remaining despite summit finish approaching, suggesting confidence in recovery or bonus desperation.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: bridged to GAUDU solo then dropped him in final kilometer, demonstrating superior kick after neutralizing VINGEGAARD
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: lost 44 seconds after initiating hostilities, suggesting March form deficit compared to July capacity
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: solo move to 3.5km forced POGAČAR response, finished second at 44s despite being caught late
rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: positive: finished ahead of VINGEGAARD despite no mention of attacking, revealing climbers outperforming Tour champion
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: finished within one minute for fourth on GC without visible aggression, banking position over risks
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: negative: yellow jersey holder dropped immediately when VINGEGAARD attacked, confirming unsustainable GC position
